RICHARD SEROTER: All
right, welcome, everybody.
What's new in Cloud.
Now, my name is Richard.

expect you to all remember,
by the end of this.
It's going to be great.
So ton happening in Cloud.

Hopefully, you already got
excited by other keynotes today.

So we're going to jump
right in and talk about,
of course, what's new with AI.

It's contractually obligated
for me as an employee at Google
to start with AI.
So let's do that.
What's new with models?

What should we be
excited about here?

I'm going to try to put
these things in context,

not just drown you
in announcements.

But what's interesting
and new with models?

Hey, look, if you're using

from great open models,
great partners.

amazing set of choices

when you're using
Google Cloud to pick

your favorite model of choice,
if that's somehow not Gemini.

A lot of things in
preview, you saw today.

Gemini 2.5 Pro is going
to be coming GA shortly.
Gemini 2.5 Flash coming soon.

The live API, some
amazing things

you're seeing with
the ability to do

different types of interactions,

remarkable things

models like Llama 4.

You do not deploy this
on infrastructure.

a number of them.

and that's all you pay for.

it easier and easier

This is Google
Cloud's AI platform.

This is how you do all

Let's talk about

contextual responses?
